description: In the lab, Fitz laments not being the one to save Simmons but is reassured by her genuine gratitude and affection—he was her support and hero throughout their ordeal. Their friendship deepens, with Simmons giving Fitz a heartfelt kiss on the cheek.

transcript.line: ... And I was going to do it.
I had the antiserum, the chute... everything. I just couldn't get the straps on.
And, you know, maybe I couldn't have done the whole “James Bond in midair...”
Please, just... Ward did an amazing thing, yes, but it wasn't Ward by my side in that lab, searching for a cure. It wasn't Ward giving me hope when I had none. It was you. You're the hero.
